rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §26.009, which governs parental consent for school district activities such as psychological examinations, recordings, and health care services.
quote: Sec. 26.009. CONSENT REQUIRED FOR CERTAIN ACTIVITIES.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns school district parental consent requirements and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
